theme: 经典电影角色 Coser 和当今商业名人的双人合影自拍，像活动现场偶遇随手拍

items.categoryLabel: 电影角色×商业名人自拍
items.title: Leia × Jensen Huang 自拍
items.description: 莱娅公主和黄仁勋同框的随手自拍，既像活动偶遇，也保留了很强的角色识别度。
items.prompt: Create a vertical realistic iPhone selfie photo. Princess Leia from Star Wars with Jensen Huang in a casual chance encounter selfie. Leia has iconic side-bun hairstyle, white princess outfit, dignified resilient expression; Jensen Huang is clearly recognizable in realistic modern clothing. Arm-length selfie perspective, slightly awkward crop, upscale public setting, mild motion blur, JPEG artifacts, no text, no logos.

items.categoryLabel: 电影角色×商业名人自拍
items.title: Hermione × Bill Gates 自拍
items.description: 赫敏和比尔·盖茨的自拍组合很出人意料，但角色和人物都能一眼认出来。
items.prompt: Create a vertical realistic iPhone selfie photo. Hermione Granger from Harry Potter with Bill Gates in a spontaneous two-person selfie. Hermione has wavy brown hair, school scarf or wizard-academic styling, smart determined expression; Bill Gates clearly recognizable, natural modern appearance. Slight lens distortion, casual conference or public setting, no text, no logos.

items.categoryLabel: 电影角色×商业名人自拍
items.title: Mathilda × Elon Musk 自拍
items.description: 玛蒂尔达的警觉气质和马斯克的现实感放在同一张自拍里，反差感很强。
items.prompt: Create a vertical realistic iPhone selfie photo. Mathilda from Leon: The Professional with Elon Musk in a spontaneous real-world selfie. Mathilda has short bob or shoulder-length hair, choker, guarded precocious expression; Elon Musk clearly recognizable. Casual event or city setting, imperfect composition, slight motion blur, JPEG artifacts, no text, no logos.

Mia has black bob with bangs, white shirt and black styling, cool dangerous expression; Bernard Arnault clearly recognizable in realistic modern clothing. Hotel or gala setting, slight crop awkwardness, no text, no logos.

items.categoryLabel: 电影角色×商业名人自拍
items.title: Holly × Tim Cook 自拍

items.prompt: Create a vertical realistic iPhone selfie photo. Holly Golightly from Breakfast at Tiffanys with Tim Cook in a casual selfie. Holly has elegant updo, black dress, pearls, sophisticated aloof expression; Tim Cook clearly recognizable and naturally posed. Upscale public interior, slight JPEG compression, no text, no logos.

items.categoryLabel: 电影角色×商业名人自拍
